reasoning: User asks for aurora borealis in Japan — this is a misconception (Japan is below the typical auroral zone; weak red aurora visible only rarely from northernmost Hokkaido). Tool returns 74 unrelated cookie-banner snippets and a Furano DMO plan. Server made no attempt to clarify or surface the rare Hokkaido sightings; agent is left without truth signal.
missing_data: Note that auroras are extremely rare in Japan (occasional red aurora from Wakkanai/Rishiri); Hokkaido planetariums or 'northern lights' viewing tours abroad as alternatives.
improvement_hint: Add a fact-anchor or note when query is a known impossibility/rarity (オーロラ/北極圏現象) rather than dumping fuzzy keyword matches; include description-level filtering to drop cookie-banner spots.
